workflows.name: Regenerate all example GraphQL artifacts
workflows.goal: Refresh example-generated models, resolvers, directive args, scalar resolvers, and TypeRegistry from current SDL.
expected_outcomes: Generated files under example/GraphQL align with current schema and builder behavior.

workflows.name: Regenerate only the example TypeRegistry
workflows.goal: Refresh or inspect generated runtime registry output without regenerating all example model artifacts.
expected_outcomes: example/GraphQL/TypeRegistry.php matches current schema and TypeRegistry builder logic.

workflows.name: Run local example GraphQL server
workflows.goal: Serve the generated example GraphQL schema over HTTP for manual testing.
expected_outcomes: Local server handles GraphQL requests described in example/TEST.md.

workflows.name: Install repository dependencies
workflows.goal: Prepare the repository for validation and example scripts.
expected_outcomes: Vendor dependencies are installed for CLI scripts and PHPUnit.

workflows.name: Run CI-like validation locally
workflows.goal: Mirror the committed automated validation path as closely as the repository documents.
expected_outcomes: composer.json validates under strict rules and PHPUnit succeeds for configured suites.

workflows.name: Reproduce parser v4 compatibility job
workflows.goal: Exercise the CI path that forces nikic/php-parser v4 before rerunning tests.
expected_outcomes: Repository behavior is validated against the php-parser v4 compatibility path used in CI.
